notes: CertiK reported the attacker borrowed 10250000 USDC from Solend before buying ANA
Tient Technologies reported the attack changed ANA value from 8 dollars before the manipulated update
Tient Technologies reported the manipulated ANA value reached 24.27 dollars per transaction
CertiK described the Buy 3 command as manipulating ANA price from 8 dollars to 24 dollars
CertiK estimated attacker profit at approximately 3574635 dollars
CertiK reported approximately 3490563 USDT received from the Nirvana treasury
CertiK reported ANA collapsed approximately 85 percent after the attack
Tient Technologies reported NIRV dropped to 0.14 dollars at writing time
CertiK traced the stolen funds from Solana to an Ethereum wallet through Wormhole
DOJ described approximately 3.6 million dollars stolen from Nirvana Finance
Nirvana said Ahmed was ordered to pay 3.4 million dollars in restitution to Nirvana
